description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, depicted standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The figure is wearing tight, knee-length shorts with a wide waistband and leg bands, both featuring a contrasting trim. The head is covered with a fitted cap, and the figure is barefoot, with detailed toes and fingers visible. The skin is smooth and evenly toned, and the musculature is well-defined, especially on the chest, arms, and back. The face is neutral, with no visible facial hair or accessories. The overall appearance suggests athletic or swimwear attire, suitable for urban or recreational environments.
description: Athletic adult male figure in fitted shorts and cap, barefoot and standing upright with defined musculature. The attire and posture suggest readiness for activity or recreation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abdomen, and facial features, with arms and legs fully visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the contour of the shorts, with one arm and leg in clear outline.
description_view_2: Back view displays the broad shoulders, defined back muscles, and the rear of the shorts, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, chest, and shorts, with the opposite arm and leg in outline.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic knee-length shorts with a fitted swim cap
